outlook.volatilityExpectation: Moderate volatility expected. Positive total GEX stabilizes market, but bearish skew (1.29-1.34) and negative monthly GEX suggest downside risk amplification if support breaks.
outlook.summary: Spot tests 0DTE gamma flip at 24328 with mixed signals. Max pain cluster (24000-24100) below spot creates downward magnetism. 24000 shows multi-expiry resonance with heavy monthly put protection (535 OI). Bearish skew validates support importance. Watch for rejection at 24300-24328 or drift toward max pain zone.

levels.motivazione: 0DTE gamma flip just 0.4% above spot. Critical pivot where dealer hedging shifts from stabilizing to amplifying. High probability rejection zone.
Significant call OI in WEEKLY (202) and MONTHLY (411). Aligns with gamma flip creating confluence resistance. Dealer selling expected.
Monthly max pain 0.5% below spot with heavy call OI (245). Strong magnetic attraction for market maker pinning. Target level.
RESONANCE across ALL expiries. 0DTE max pain, MONTHLY put wall (535 OI). Structural support with multi-expiry protection. High volume signal.
Highest 0DTE call OI (188). Primary resistance 2% above spot. Dealer hedging creates selling pressure at this level.
RESONANCE with significant call OI across all expiries (167/106/67). Psychological level and major upside target.
0DTE put wall (118 OI) + WEEKLY call wall below spot (543 OI). Both create dealer buying support dynamics.
